# Pull Request

## Summary

- 

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Test
- [ ] Performance
- [ ] Security/privacy
- [ ] Release preparation
- [ ] Other

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `cargo check --manifest-path .\src-tauri\Cargo.toml`
- [ ] `cargo test --manifest-path .\src-tauri\Cargo.toml`
- [ ] `npm run build:modern-installer`
- [ ] Manual test notes added, if needed

## Privacy And Security

- [ ] No clipboard body text added to logs
- [ ] No passwords, tokens, Authorization headers, or private keys added to logs
- [ ] No local databases, sync packages, certificates, `.env`, or build artifacts committed
- [ ] Sync/installer/data-retention impact considered, if relevant

## Screenshots

Add screenshots for UI changes.

## Notes For Reviewers

Anything reviewers should pay special attention to.
